Garbled phrasing like 'into sad its tiny' renders text incomprehensible; lacks logical flow.
Far below required length (13 vs 44 words); underdeveloped, omits key details.
Fragmented and incoherent sequence; no smooth transitions.
Fails to retain fable's reflective, ironic tone; distorts meaning through omissions.
Heavy reliance on fragmented source phrasing; no effective rewording.
Numerous grammatical errors, incomplete sentences; poor structure.
Partially relevant to pearl on crown but vague and incomplete; concise length.

ideal_precis.title: Drop to Priceless Pearl
ideal_precis.text: A drop of water, lamenting its insignificance amid the vast ocean, was swallowed by a nearby oyster during its soliloquy. Hardening gradually in the shell, it became a pearl that, after many adventures, now adorns the Persian crown.

annotations.rubric_point: Garbled phrasing like 'into sad its tiny' renders text incomprehensible; lacks logical flow.
annotations.correction: into the sea; it was tiny
annotations.comment: Fix word order and add missing words for readable sentence.

annotations.rubric_point: Far below required length (13 vs 44 words); underdeveloped, omits key details.

annotations.comment: Specify fable's transformation moral for relevance and precision.

annotations.rubric_point: Numerous grammatical errors, incomplete sentences; poor structure.
